introSection: 1066 is a steel roller coaster located at Festyland in Bretteville-Sur-Odon, Normandy, France. It was built by French company Soquet. The name of this ride is a reference to the year the Battle of Hastings took place, where William the Conqueror defeated Harold Godwinson and conquered England.
fullText:
1066 is a steel roller coaster located at Festyland in Bretteville-Sur-Odon, Normandy, France. It was built by French company Soquet. The name of this ride is a reference to the year the Battle of Hastings took place, where William the Conqueror defeated Harold Godwinson and conquered England.

Silver track and green supports.
